The Problem

Energy Costs Are Rising.
Most Systems Don't Keep Up.

01

Rising power prices

Energy costs continue to climb. Businesses absorbing price increases without a strategy are leaving significant money behind.

02

Underperforming systems

Most solar installations are set and forgotten. Without ongoing tuning, they degrade in performance and financial return over time.

03

Unmanaged energy

Energy is rarely managed — it's just consumed. Without visibility, there's no way to act on the data your system generates every day.

Without optimisation, value is left on the table — every single day your system runs.

The Opportunity

Turn Energy Into a
Competitive Advantage

Lower operating costs

Solar and battery systems, properly optimised, significantly reduce your energy spend — turning a fixed cost into a managed, controllable asset.

Improve energy independence

Reduce your reliance on the grid and insulate your business from market volatility and supply disruptions. Control your own energy future.

Future-proof your business

Protect your operations from future price increases with an energy system designed for long-term performance and adaptability.

Your energy system becomes an asset — not just an expense.

The Blackcurrent Difference

More Than an Installation

A complete energy solution — from day one, and every day after. We don't stop at install. Most providers do.

01

Design

Engineered for performance from the ground up. Every system is modelled against your specific energy profile, site, and commercial objectives.

02

Install

Built to last. Quality components, precision installation, and rigorous commissioning — so your system performs from day one.

03

Optimise with Flex

Continuously improving. The Flex Platform monitors, learns, and automatically optimises your system to maximise financial return — every day.

Most providers stop at install. We don't.

Flex Platform

Your Energy System,
Intelligently Managed

Flex turns your solar and battery system into a high-performing financial asset — with live monitoring, automated optimisation, and real insights.

See What Your System Is Really Worth

Live financial dashboards show you exactly what your system is generating, saving, and worth — in real time and over time.

Optimise Automatically

Flex continuously adjusts how your system charges, discharges, and responds to pricing signals — without you lifting a finger.

Act on Real Insights

Turn data into decisions. Flex surfaces actionable opportunities to further improve performance and reduce costs.

Stay on Track

Regular reporting keeps you informed and confident that your energy investment is delivering what it should, every month.

From monitoring to optimisation — Flex makes your system work harder.

Value in Action

Real Results,
Not Just Promises

Small changes in how your energy system is managed can unlock significant, compounding financial value over time.

+34%

Increase Solar Self-Consumption

Flex shifts energy usage to when your solar is producing, dramatically increasing the proportion of free energy you actually use.

−28%

Reduce Peak Demand Costs

Smart battery dispatch avoids expensive peak tariff periods — one of the highest-leverage opportunities in commercial energy.

3.2×

Improve Return on Investment

Optimised systems consistently outperform unmanaged equivalents. Flex turns good solar into an exceptional financial asset.

Small changes can unlock significant value.

How It Works

Simple, End-to-End Delivery

01

Design

We analyse your site, energy data, and commercial goals to engineer a system purpose-built for your business. No generic configurations — every design is bespoke.

02

Install

Our team installs and commissions your system to the highest standard. Quality equipment, precise installation, and rigorous testing — so it works from day one.

03

Optimise

The Flex Platform takes over — continuously monitoring, learning, and improving your system's performance and financial output. The work doesn't stop at handover.
